text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah announced between 01:20 and 09:45 on April 13 that they carried out rocket and drone attacks targeting the settlements of Kiryat Shmona, Doviv, and Shlomi, as well as the Matalba position. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah announced between 10:55 and 11:45 on April 13 that they carried out multiple rocket and drone attacks targeting Israeli forces and positions, including Misgav Am, Kiryat Shmona, Avivim, and Shomera, as well as Al-Owaidat hill near Adaisseh. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党宣布在4月13日01:20至09:45之间，对基里亚特什莫纳（Kiryat Shmona）、多维夫（Doviv）和什洛米（Shlomi）定居点以及马塔尔巴（Matalba）阵地发动了火箭弹和无人机袭击。@wfwitness” ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党宣布在4月13日10:55至11:45之间，对包括米斯加夫阿姆（Misgav Am）、基里亚特什莫纳、阿维维姆（Avivim）和肖梅拉（Shomera）以及阿代塞（Adaisseh）附近的Al-Owaidat山在内的以色列军队和阵地发动了多次火箭弹和无人机袭击。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in Karmiel, and the surrounding areas of the Upper Galilee region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起红色警报。@wfwitness” ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部上加利利地区的卡尔米耶尔（Karmiel）及周边地区响起红色警报。@wfwitness

text: 🇷🇺 💬 🇭🇺 We respect the choice of the Hungarian people - Peskov "We expect to continue our very pragmatic contacts with the new leadership of Hungary. We have heard statements, especially about the readiness to engage in dialogue," - said the presidential press secretary. Peskov noted that it is necessary to observe the actions of the new leadership of Hungary. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 💬 🇭🇺 我们尊重匈牙利人民的选择 - 佩斯科夫 “我们期待继续与匈牙利新领导层进行非常务实的接触。我们已经听到了相关声明，特别是关于进行对话的意愿，”总统新闻秘书说。佩斯科夫指出，有必要观察匈牙利新领导层的行动。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Michael A. Horowitz Two Iranian-linked tankers exit the Gulf via Strait of Hormuz, ahead of US-announced blockade, Reuters reports citing shipping data. tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 路透社援引航运数据报道，在美方宣布封锁之前，两艘与伊朗有关的油轮已通过霍尔木兹海峡离开海湾。推文

text: Open Source Intel German Chancellor Merz on the collapsed U.S.-Iran talks: "From the very beginning, I didn't get the impression that they were really well prepared. I was not surprised by the decision to break off the talks." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043629925412843754/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 德国总理默茨谈及破裂的美伊谈判：“从一开始，我就没有感觉到他们真的做好了充分准备。我对中断谈判的决定并不感到惊讶。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043629925412843754/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇩🇪 🇭🇺 Friedrich Merz: 📌 “I am personally very grateful for this clear election result in Hungary. It shows that our democratic societies are more resilient than many think. Our democracies can withstand Russian propaganda and foreign interference.” 📌 “Right-wing populism has suffered a heavy defeat in Hungary. A clear signal has come from Hungary against right-wing populism worldwide.” See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 ：🇩🇪 🇭🇺 弗里德里希·默茨：📌 “我个人非常感谢匈牙利这次明确的选举结果。它表明我们的民主社会比许多人想象的更具韧性。我们的民主制度能够抵御俄罗斯的宣传和外国干涉。” 📌 “右翼民粹主义在匈牙利遭受了惨败。匈牙利向全球发出了反对右翼民粹主义的明确信号。” 与我们一起查看最新动态：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel Pope Leo XIV has arrived in Algeria, beginning a 10-day tour of Cameroon, Angola, and Equatorial Guinea. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043629274960167033/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 教皇利奥十四世已抵达阿尔及利亚，开启对喀麦隆、安哥拉和赤道几内亚为期10天的访问。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043629274960167033/video/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix Future FM of Hungary Yesterday, Hungary has chosen a new direction. With 98% of the votes counted, we have secured 138 seats in the 199-member parliament, representing more than 3.1 million votes. We also expect to win two additional individual constituencies once ballots from voters casting their votes away from their place of residence are fully counted. The Hungarian people have granted the Tisza Party a constitutional majority with a clear mandate: to restore the rule of law and return Hungary to its rightful place in Europe, among democratic nations. To everyone who helped us achieve this victory: thank you. From this moment on, we will work to earn your trust every single day. - Anita Orban tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 匈牙利未来外交部长 昨天，匈牙利选择了新的方向。在统计了98%的选票后，我们已在199个席位的议会中获得了138个席位，代表了超过310万张选票。我们还预计，在完全统计完离开居住地投票的选民选票后，我们将赢得另外两个个人选区。匈牙利人民赋予了蒂萨党（Tisza Party）宪法多数席位和明确的授权：恢复法治，让匈牙利回到欧洲应有的位置，回到民主国家行列。感谢所有帮助我们取得这一胜利的人：谢谢。从这一刻起，我们将努力每天赢得你们的信任。 - 安妮塔·欧尔班（Anita Orban）推文

text: The Spectator Index ENERGY PRICES TODAY US crude oil prices are up 8%, trading at $104 Brent crude oil prices are up 8%, trading at $103 European gas is up 9.2%, trading at $47.7 Heating oil is up 8.7%, trading at $4.08 Gasoline is up 4.4%, trading at $3.17 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 今日能源价格 美国原油价格上涨8%，报104美元 布伦特原油价格上涨8%，报103美元 欧洲天然气价格上涨9.2%，报47.7美元 取暖油价格上涨8.7%，报4.08美元 汽油价格上涨4.4%，报3.17美元 推文

text: Open Source Intel Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan: "Israel is not a structure that produces power on its own. There is a mindset here that has managed to hack the American political system through Zionism. What the United States does in this region does not serve its own interests, but benefits Israel. So why does the United States do this? It is not a rational model of behavior. It happens when you influence (American) politics." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹：“以色列不是一个能独立产生权力的结构。这里有一种心态，通过犹太复国主义成功黑进了美国政治体系。美国在这个地区所做的事情并不服务于其自身利益，而是让以色列受益。那么美国为什么要这样做呢？这不是一种理性的行为模式。当你影响（美国）政治时，就会发生这种情况。” 推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Pope Leo XIV arrives in Algeria beginning 10-day tour of four countries in Africa, after Algeria he will visit Cameroon, Angola and Equatorial Guinea. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043627172179415366/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯 - 教皇利奥十四世抵达阿尔及利亚，开始对非洲四个国家进行为期10天的访问，在阿尔及利亚之后，他将访问喀麦隆、安哥拉和赤道几内亚。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043627172179415366/video/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender French President Emmanuel Macron has announced that France and the UK will hold a conference of nations willing to participate in a multinational coalition “aimed at restoring freedom of navigation in the [Strait of Hormuz].” President Macron called it a “strictly defensive mission, separate from warring parties.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙宣布，法国和英国将举行会议，邀请愿意参加多国联盟的国家参加，“旨在恢复[霍尔木兹海峡]的航行自由”。马克龙总统称这是一项“严格的防御性任务，与交战方分开”。推文

text: Open Source Intel RT @Osint613 : Boeing KC-135 Stratotanke arrives at RAF Mildenhall with heavy shrapnel damage visible across the aircraft. @RapidReport2025 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043379443062710442/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel RT @Osint613 ：波音KC-135空中加油机抵达米尔登霍尔皇家空军基地，飞机上可见严重的弹片损伤。@RapidReport2025 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043379443062710442/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW: Iran-linked hacking group Handala claims it is launching cyberattacks targeting Saudi industrial infrastructure: Fars https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043625869357244891/photo/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Spot on Read through this and realize how minor the demands are It’s just “be a normal country, diplomatically.” And the Iranians were like “How dare you suggest we give up the right to fund terrorists and build nukes.” - Will Chamberlain tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 点评 阅读这些内容并意识到这些要求是多么微不足道。这只是“做一个正常的外交国家”。而伊朗人却说“你们怎么敢建议我们放弃资助恐怖分子和制造核武器的权利”。 - 威尔·张伯伦（Will Chamberlain）推文

text: Open Source Intel Heavy aircraft activity reported over Marib, Yemen Marib is in central Yemen and has been a major frontline area in the war. The Houthis have repeatedly tried to capture it, but it has largely remained under anti-Houthi control, It sits right near active Houthi frontlines Unknown aircraft at this time. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 据报道，也门马里布（Marib）上空有重型飞机活动。马里布位于也门中部，一直是战争中的主要前线地区。胡塞武装多次试图占领它，但它在很大程度上仍处于反胡塞武装的控制之下，它就在活跃的胡塞前线附近。目前不明飞机。推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran executed at least 1,639 people in 2025, the highest annual figure since 1989 and a 68% increase over 2024's 975 executions. - Iran International, citing human rights organizations tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗在2025年至少处决了1639人，这是自1989年以来的最高年度数字，比2024年的975次处决增加了68%。 - 伊朗国际（Iran International），援引人权组织 推文

text: Open Source Intel Pakistani MFA source: Officials are pushing to bring the U.S. back to talks, with recent meetings with Iran and the U.S. held in a “positive atmosphere,” signaling both sides remain open to dialogue. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043624587477332098/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 巴基斯坦外交部消息人士：官员们正在推动美国重返谈判，最近与伊朗和美国举行的会议是在“积极的氛围”中进行的，这表明双方都对对话持开放态度。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043624587477332098/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Pope Leo XIV, responding to President Trump: “I will continue to express my position against the war.” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043624383466418355/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 教皇利奥十四世回应特朗普总统：“我将继续表达我反对战争的立场。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043624383466418355/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Spokesperson for Iran’s military: “Our armed forces will continue to defend Iran’s territorial waters with determination. Enemy vessels have no right to pass through the Strait of Hormuz and will not pass, while other ships may transit under rules set by the Iranian armed forces.” ICYMI Trump: “The United States to Blockade Ships Entering or Exiting Iranian Ports on April 13 at 10:00 A.M. ET. Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DJT” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043623797723374024/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊朗军方发言人：“我们的武装部队将继续坚定地捍卫伊朗的领海。敌方船只无权通过霍尔木兹海峡，也不会通过，而其他船只可以在伊朗武装部队设定的规则下通行。” 错过的消息 特朗普：“美国将于4月13日上午10:00（东部时间）封锁进出伊朗港口的船只。感谢您对此事的关注！总统DJT” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043623797723374024/photo/1 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese FM Youssef Reji spoke with the German FM, who announced €45 million in humanitarian aid to Lebanon. Reji: "I made it clear that Lebanon aspires, through direct negotiations with Israel, to reach a ceasefire. This route strengthened the separation between the Lebanese and Iranian case. The state of Lebanon alone holds the authority to make decisions regarding negotiations on behalf of Lebanon." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 黎巴嫩外交部长优素福·雷吉（Youssef Reji）与德国外交部长进行了交谈，后者宣布向黎巴嫩提供4500万欧元的紧急人道主义援助。雷吉：“我明确表示，黎巴嫩渴望通过与以色列的直接谈判实现停火。这一途径加强了黎巴嫩问题与伊朗问题的分离。只有黎巴嫩国家才有权代表黎巴嫩就谈判做出决定。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel ICYMI Trump: “The United States to Blockade Ships Entering or Exiting Iranian Ports on April 13 at 10:00 A.M. ET. Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DJT” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043623797723374024/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 错过的消息 特朗普：“美国将于4月13日上午10:00（东部时间）封锁进出伊朗港口的船只。感谢您对此事的关注！总统DJT” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043623797723374024/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Reuters: Iranian sources claim the U.S. agreed to unfreeze some assets, including up to $6B in Qatar, as a goodwill step tied to Hormuz access. A U.S. official denied any deal. The talks in Islamabad lasted about 21 hours and collapsed over major gaps, mainly on Iran’s nuclear program and U.S. demands for strict long-term limits and free shipping through the Strait of Hormuz. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 路透社：伊朗消息人士称，美国同意解冻部分资产，包括在卡塔尔的60亿美元，作为与霍尔木兹海峡准入挂钩的善意步骤。一名美国官员否认了任何交易。伊斯兰堡的谈判持续了约21小时，因主要分歧而破裂，主要是关于伊朗的核计划以及美国对严格的长期限制和通过霍尔木兹海峡自由航行的要求。推文

text: Kremlin: The Kremlin does not believe Hungary’s elections will affect the situation around the Russia–Ukraine conflict.
text_zh: 克里姆林宫：克里姆林宫不认为匈牙利的选举会影响俄罗斯与乌克兰冲突周围的局势。

text: Pope Leo XIV: I have no fear of the Trump administration or speaking out loudly of the message of the Gospel, which is what I believe I am here to do, what the Church is here to do. We are not politicians. We don’t deal with foreign policy with the same perspective he might understand it, but I do believe in the message of the Gospel, as a peacemaker. Source: OSV News
text_zh: 教皇利奥十四世：我不怕特朗普政府，也不怕大声说出福音的信息，我相信这就是我在这里要做的事情，也是教会在这里要做的事情。我们不是政客。我们处理外交政策的视角可能与他理解的不同，但我确实相信福音的信息，作为一名和平缔造者。来源：OSV News

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起红色警报。@wfwitness

text: Kremlin: Russia’s proposal to accept Iran’s enriched uranium remains on the table, but it has not been taken up.
text_zh: 克里姆林宫：俄罗斯关于接受伊朗浓缩铀的提议仍然有效，但尚未被采纳。

text: Kremlin: The Hungarian people have made their choice, and Russia respects it. Russia expects to continue contacts with Hungary’s new leadership.
text_zh: 克里姆林宫：匈牙利人民做出了他们的选择，俄罗斯尊重这一选择。俄罗斯期待继续与匈牙利新领导层保持联系。

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇺🇸⚡️Trump’s Narcissistic Rant: Slams Pope Leo XIV as “Weak”" ⚡️ Pope Leo XIV on Trump : "I don't think that the message of the Gospel is meant to be abused in the way that some people are doing. I will continue to speak out loudly against war"

text: German Chancellor Merz: We will continue to feel the consequences of the war in Iran for a long time, even after it is over. We are preparing ourselves for a prolonged period of significant strain on the German economy, and therefore also on private households.
text_zh: 德国总理默茨：即使在伊朗战争结束后，我们仍将在很长一段时间内感受到其后果。我们正在为德国经济以及私人家庭长期承受巨大压力做好准备。

text: German Chancellor Merz: I was not surprised by the decision to break off the talks in Islamabad. From the beginning, I did not have the impression that they were really well prepared.
text_zh: 德国总理默茨：我对中断伊斯兰堡谈判的决定并不感到惊讶。从一开始，我就没有感觉到他们真的做好了充分准备。

text: German Chancellor Merz: The war in Iran is the actual cause of the problems that we are also facing in our own country.
text_zh: 德国总理默茨：伊朗战争是我们国家目前面临问题的真正原因。

text: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan: Israel is not a structure that produces power on its own. There is a mindset here that has managed to hack the American political system through Zionism. What the United States does in this region does not serve its own interests, but benefits Israel. So why does the United States do this? It is not a rational model of behavior. It happens when you influence (American) politics.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹：以色列不是一个能独立产生权力的结构。这里有一种心态，通过犹太复国主义成功黑进了美国政治体系。美国在这个地区所做的事情并不服务于其自身利益，而是让以色列受益。那么美国为什么要这样做呢？这不是一种理性的行为模式。当你影响（美国）政治时，就会发生这种情况。

text: 🇹🇷 💬 🇬🇷 🇮🇱 Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan on Greece-Israel relations: We see that Greece is pursuing highly risky policies here. There are very interesting aspects in Greece attempting to follow a type of policy that no other country in Europe is pursuing on its own. Neither Greece nor Southern Cyprus needs military cooperation with Israel. Greece is already a member of NATO, and Southern Cyprus has the backing of the EU. What strategic logic could justify seeking this kind of cooperation is something they cannot explain to me either. This is most likely an imposition on the government made under external pressure. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇹🇷 💬 🇬🇷 🇮🇱 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹谈希腊-以色列关系：我们看到希腊在这里奉行极其危险的政策。希腊试图奉行一种欧洲其他国家没有单独奉行的政策，这有非常有趣的方面。希腊和南塞浦路斯都不需要与以色列进行军事合作。希腊已经是北约成员国，南塞浦路斯有欧盟的支持。什么样的战略逻辑可以证明寻求这种合作是合理的，这是他们也无法向我解释的。这很可能是外部压力下对政府的强加。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan: After Iran, Israel cannot live without an enemy. We see that they are in search of developing a new rhetoric and declaring Turkey as the new enemy. We observe this not only in Netanyahu, but also among some figures in the Israeli opposition.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹：在伊朗之后，以色列没有敌人就无法生存。我们看到他们正在寻求发展一种新的言论，并将土耳其宣布为新的敌人。我们不仅在内塔尼亚胡身上观察到这一点，在一些以色列反对派人物中也观察到了这一点。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran’s deputy interior minister Ali Akbar Pourjamshidian said U.S. President Trump’s threat to “destroy our civilisation” is more a joke born of ignorance than a serious analysis. He stated that those who do not understand Iran’s civilisation cannot grasp its depth, even if infrastructure is targeted. He added that when Iranians’ national pride is wounded, they rally in the streets to defend their country, and that even those with grievances against the system show fierce defence when faced with an external threat. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗内政部副部长阿里·阿克巴尔·普尔贾姆希迪安（Ali Akbar Pourjamshidian）表示，美国总统特朗普关于“摧毁我们的文明”的威胁，更多是出于无知的笑话，而非严肃的分析。他指出，那些不了解伊朗文明的人无法理解其深度，即使基础设施成为目标。他补充说，当伊朗人的民族自尊心受到伤害时，他们会走上街头保卫国家，即使是那些对体制有不满的人，在面对外部威胁时也会表现出激烈的防御。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active across 2 regions in Northern Israel: • Confrontation Line • Upper Galilee @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in Nahariya, and the surrounding areas of the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 以色列北部2个地区无人机警报响起：• 对抗线 • 上加利利 @wfwitness” ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部纳哈里亚（Nahariya）及对抗线地区周边地区无人机警报响起。@wfwitness

text: 🇷🇺 Due to developments in the Middle East, European farmers are being forced to switch to fertilizers from North Africa, North America, and Russia - the Russian Security Council If the current trajectory of the Middle East conflict persists through the summer, the world could face the largest surge in global food inflation in recent years. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 由于中东的事态发展，欧洲农民被迫转向北非、北美和俄罗斯的化肥 - 俄罗斯安全委员会 如果中东冲突的当前轨迹持续到夏季，世界可能会面临近年来全球食品通胀的最大涨幅。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan: Neither Greece nor Southern Cyprus needs military cooperation with Israel. Greece is already a member of NATO, and Southern Cyprus has the backing of the EU. What strategic logic could justify seeking this kind of cooperation is something they cannot explain to me either. This is most likely an imposition on the government made under external pressure.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹：希腊和南塞浦路斯都不需要与以色列进行军事合作。希腊已经是北约成员国，南塞浦路斯有欧盟的支持。什么样的战略逻辑可以证明寻求这种合作是合理的，这是他们也无法向我解释的。这很可能是外部压力下对政府的强加。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Israeli military has captured Bint Jbeil’s stadium, where in 2000 former Hezbollah leader Hassan Nasrallah delivered a victory speech famously describing Israel as “weaker than a spider web." “Bint Jbeil 2000: There was someone here who spoke and boasted about webs and spiders. Today, that man no longer exists, the stadium is gone, and his words are worth nothing,” said 98th Division commander Brig. Gen. Guy Levy. “Bint Jbeil 2026: Our forces control the area, destroying terror infrastructure and dozens of terrorists.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列军队占领了宾特朱拜勒（Bint Jbeil）体育场，2000年，前真主党领导人哈桑·纳斯鲁拉（Hassan Nasrallah）曾在此发表胜利演讲，著名地将以色列描述为“比蜘蛛网还脆弱”。“宾特朱拜勒2000：曾经有人在这里谈论和吹嘘网和蜘蛛。今天，那个人已经不存在了，体育场也不见了，他的话一文不值，”第98师指挥官盖伊·利维（Guy Levy）准将说。“宾特朱拜勒2026：我们的部队控制了该地区，摧毁了恐怖基础设施和数十名恐怖分子。” @wfwitness

text: Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan on Greece-Israel relations: We see that Greece is pursuing highly risky policies here. There are very interesting aspects in Greece attempting to follow a type of policy that no other country in Europe is pursuing on its own.
text_zh: 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹谈希腊-以色列关系：我们看到希腊在这里奉行极其危险的政策。希腊试图奉行一种欧洲其他国家没有单独奉行的政策，这有非常有趣的方面。

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active across 2 regions in Northern Israel: • Confrontation Line • Upper Galilee @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部2个地区无人机警报响起：• 对抗线 • 上加利利 @wfwitness

text: Pope Leo told Reuters he didn't "want to get into a debate" with Trump. "I don't ‌think that the message of the Gospel is meant to be abused in ‌the way that some people are doing," he said. "I will continue to speak out loudly against war, looking to promote peace, ⁠promoting dialogue and multilateral ​relationships among the states to look ​for just solutions to problems," ​he said.
text_zh: 教皇利奥告诉路透社，他“不想卷入”与特朗普的辩论。“我不认为福音的信息应该像某些人那样被滥用，”他说。“我将继续大声疾呼反对战争，寻求促进和平，促进国家之间的对话和多边关系，以寻找解决问题的公正方案，”他说。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Negotiations between Israel and Lebanon are set to open on Tuesday in Washington at the ambassadorial level. Lebanese Culture Minister Ghassan Salamé said the meeting is not for negotiations but for “discussions or talks of a logistical nature." The only issue Lebanon’s ambassador can raise is achieving a ceasefire. “If we achieve a ceasefire, it is a good thing; if not, the ambassador cannot cross this red line,” he said. A senior Hezbollah official told RIA Novosti that the Lebanese government’s stance against Hezbollah threatens to split the country. He did not rule out the possibility of replacing the government under pressure from popular protests. Lebanese President Joseph Aoun and Prime Minister Salam have separated the Lebanese issue from the Iranian issue, and Iran will not be allowed to interfere. The meeting will focus on the need for a ceasefire before talks – a Lebanese condition that has not yet received an Israeli response. Hezbollah’s deputy political chief, Mahmoud Qamati, criticised the Lebanese government for rushing to negotiate with Israel under fire. “Aren’t you ashamed? You, Prime Minister, are not ashamed to go and negotiate while Israel warns you not to talk about a ceasefire?” He added that Israel wants to disarm Hezbollah, calling that an internal Lebanese issue, and warned that external forces are leading Lebanon into anarchy and destruction. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 以色列和黎巴嫩之间的谈判定于周二在华盛顿举行大使级会谈。黎巴嫩文化部长加桑·萨拉梅（Ghassan Salamé）表示，这次会议不是为了谈判，而是为了“后勤性质的讨论或谈话”。黎巴嫩大使唯一能提出的问题是实现停火。“如果我们实现了停火，那是件好事；如果没有，大使不能越过这条红线，”他说。一位真主党高级官员告诉俄新社，黎巴嫩政府反对真主党的立场威胁到国家分裂。他不排除在民众抗议的压力下更换政府的可能性。黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩（Joseph Aoun）和总理萨拉姆（Salam）已将黎巴嫩问题与伊朗问题分开，伊朗将不得干涉。会议将重点讨论谈判前的停火需求——这是黎巴嫩的一个条件，目前尚未得到以色列的回应。真主党副政治首脑马哈茂德·卡马蒂（Mahmoud Qamati）批评黎巴嫩政府在炮火下急于与以色列谈判。“你们不感到羞耻吗？总理先生，您在以色列警告您不要谈论停火的情况下，去谈判不感到羞耻吗？” 他补充说，以色列想要解除真主党的武装，称这是黎巴嫩内部问题，并警告说外部势力正在将黎巴嫩引向无政府状态和毁灭。@wfwitness
